trigger.reason: OpenAI's launch of new voice intelligence features in its API meets all trigger criteria (tier-1 lab, new product release, direct threat to customer-service and vertical applications), with material sympathy-fade risk across listed SaaS and BPO stocks.

primary_event.headline: OpenAI launches new voice intelligence features in its API
primary_event.summary: OpenAI released new voice intelligence capabilities in its API with applications across customer service, education, and creator platforms. The feature enables voice-based AI interactions at scale, directly targeting verticals currently served by listed software and service providers.
